description_long: This chair is constructed from wooden planks and logs, giving it a rustic and handcrafted appearance. It features two horizontal slatted surfaces, with the upper one serving as the seat and the lower one possibly functioning as a footrest or storage shelf. The frame is composed of four sturdy, slightly irregular wooden legs, each joined at the corners with visible dowel-like connectors. The seat and shelf surfaces are made from several unevenly spaced wooden slats, adding to its rugged, natural look. The chair lacks a backrest and armrests, making it more of a bench or stool in form. Its design suggests durability and suitability for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments such as parks, gardens, or patios.
description: A rustic wooden chair with two slatted surfaces and four sturdy legs, lacking a backrest or armrests. Its handcrafted look and robust build make it ideal for outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: The chair is seen from the narrow end, highlighting the slatted seat and shelf, as well as the thickness of the wooden legs.
description_view_1: A frontal view showing both the seat and lower shelf, with all four legs and the full width of the slats visible.
description_view_2: Another narrow end view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the depth and alignment of the slats.
description_view_3: A rear or opposite frontal view, displaying the full width of the seat and shelf, with the legs and slat arrangement clearly visible.
